verification_steps_for_reviewer: Open ups_autonomy_check.xlsx with openpyxl and confirm formulas exist on Analysis/Checks sheets.
Run verify_autonomy.py with inputs.csv and confirm per-record margins and validation counts match maintenance_note.md.
Check the provided verification log and artifact hashes.
Open ups_autonomy_check.xlsx with openpyxl and confirm formulas exist on Analysis/Checks sheets.
Run verify_autonomy.py with inputs.csv and confirm per-record margins and validation counts match maintenance_note.md.
Check the provided verification log and artifact hashes.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: openpyxl can open the xlsx and read formulas from Analysis and Checks sheets; computed margins match maintenance_note.md values within rounding tolerance.
planned_changes.description: Regenerate ups_autonomy_check.xlsx ensuring all computed values (driver terms and margin) are implemented as cell formulas rather than hard-coded values. Preserve sheet names Inputs, Analysis, and Checks and ensure named ranges (or documented ranges) match maintenance_note citations.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: Running verify_autonomy.py on inputs.csv reproduces the per-record margins and summary checks reported in maintenance_note.md and produces an exit code 0 with a short log included in the submission.
planned_changes.description: Export Inputs sheet to inputs.csv and add a Python script (verify_autonomy.py) that reads inputs.csv, applies the exact documented formula, reproduces margins, sensitivity shifts, and summary counts, and prints a verification report.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: README contains exact commands to run the self-check script and to open the workbook; no ambiguous instructions.
planned_changes.description: Add README.md or run_instructions.txt describing how to open the workbook, the sheet layout, named ranges, how to run verify_autonomy.py, and the expected outputs to check.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: Verification log demonstrates openpyxl success and numeric agreement; artifact hashes included in submission metadata.
planned_changes.description: Add a short self-check script that uses openpyxl to open ups_autonomy_check.xlsx, extracts the formulas/results, compares them to maintenance_note values, and writes a small verification log. Include a checksum/hash of the final xlsx and CSV.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: maintenance_note.md clearly references the new artifacts and includes the command-line steps used to generate/verify results.
planned_changes.description: Update maintenance_note.md to reference the added files (inputs.csv, verify_autonomy.py, README), provide explicit instructions for reproducing sensitivity results, and note that formula visibility and intermediate sheets are preserved.

raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Restore reproducibility and enable automated verification by ensuring the workbook is parseable (openpyxl-compatible), preserving intermediate calculation sheets, and providing an alternative reproducible script and run instructions.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Maintenance note is thorough and documents the margin formula, per-record citations, sensitivity analysis, and recommendations. Score was reduced from full credit because the ups_autonomy_check.xlsx could not be parsed in the verifier environment (openpyxl unavailable), preventing independent confirmation that visible, executable formulas and intermediate calculation sheets were preserved. To achieve full reproducibility credit, provide a parseable workbook or reproducible alternative and clear run instructions.
